text:
なんだろう、イヤな予感がしてて
会いたいなって思ってたから……

ああ、こんなところに！
ダメですよ、マトイちゃん
勝手に出歩いちゃ！

ダメです。
調子が悪いのは事実なんですから
さ、帰りますよ。
Ah, you came. I'm glad to see you're all right.

You see, I was hoping to see you
after this bad premonition I had...

Ah, there you are! Matoi, you know better
than to go out without permission!
I'm all right. Just a little headache.

No, you're NOT all right.
You're still in bad shape.
Come on, now. Back we go.
I'm sorry. See you some other time.
